name: Unpackerr
short_desc: Automatically extracts downloaded archives for Sonarr, Radarr and friends.
author: Unpackerr (golift)
description: Unpackerr is a daemon that watches your download folder and automatically extracts completed archives (rar/zip/etc), then cleans them up after your *arr apps import the media. It integrates with Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Readarr and Whisparr. This package enables Unpackerr's built-in web server on port 5656, which serves a status page and Prometheus metrics.

form_fields.label: Downloads path (on the host)
form_fields.hint: Host path to your downloads folder. This MUST be the same path your Sonarr/Radarr containers see, so Unpackerr finds the same files.

form_fields.label: Timezone
form_fields.hint: e.g. America/New_York. Used for log timestamps.

form_fields.label: Run as user ID (PUID)
form_fields.hint: Match the UID that owns your downloads (the same user your *arr apps run as) so Unpackerr can read/delete files.

form_fields.label: Run as group ID (PGID)
form_fields.hint: Match the GID that owns your downloads.

form_fields.label: Sonarr URL
form_fields.hint: Optional. Leave blank if you don't use Sonarr.

form_fields.label: Radarr URL
form_fields.hint: Optional. Leave blank if you don't use Radarr.
